name: conducty-codex
description: Conducty-style orchestration for Codex: appetite planning, tracer-first execution, vault notes, prompt logs, and improvement loops.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, verify, and improve with a Conducty vault.
interface.longDescription: Adds Conducty's orchestration loop to Codex through a skill plus a local MCP server. The server initializes the vault, writes plan notes, checks prompt quality, logs prompt outcomes, records checkpoints, captures improvement kata notes, creates pre-merge ship reports, audits vault graph health, and generates local Observatory reports so orchestration state becomes durable and visible instead of living only in chat.
defaultPrompt: Log this prompt outcome to Conducty.
